commands: mkdir -p coverage && cargo llvm-cov --lcov --output-path coverage/lcov.info --lib --test unit --ignore-filename-regex '(test_api|handlers/|app\.rs|main\.rs|config\.rs|state\.rs|auth/middleware|repositories/sqlx_|db/)'
(cd ../../apps/rhino-cli && CGO_ENABLED=0 go run main.go test-coverage validate apps/demo-be-rust-axum/coverage/lcov.info 90)
